response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in distributed systems, AI-driven development, and technical strategy, with a strong background in software development and a history of contributing to various technical projects.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Strong background in distributed systems and high-throughput architectures
Proven ability to work across the stack and contribute to various technical projects
concerns: Limited direct experience with LLM, ML, or AI products
Basic German language skills may be a limitation
No direct mention of experience with agile methodology in recent roles
